labels.name: Name
bottomTexts.imageModeration: Unless you're a Supporter, newly uploaded images are shown publicly only after a moderator has checked them.
bottomTexts.name: Note that if you change your team's name then someone else can claim the name and URL for their team
bottomTexts.tag: Typically used before in-game name to indicate membership of a team (e.g. [TAG] PlayerName)
bottomTexts.disableBuildAbilitySorting: Outside of your profile page, build abilities are sorted so that same abilities are next to each other. This setting allows you to see the abilities in the order they were authored everywhere.
bottomTexts.disallowScrimPickupsFromUntr: Only applies if you are in the lobby as group leader. Other group leaders can still pick you up.
bottomTexts.spoilerFreeMode: Hides tournament results from the last week
bottomTexts.languageClockTimeNote: Clock and time formats use your browser language setting
errors.atLeastOneOption: At least one option must be selected
errors.duplicateName: There is already a team with this name
errors.duplicateOrgName: There is already an organization with this name
errors.noOnlySpecialCharacters: Name can't be only special characters
placeholders.weaponPoolFull: Pool full - remove a weapon to add more
bottomTexts.buildPrivate: Private builds are only visible to you
errors.gearAllOrNone: Fill all gear slots or leave all empty
bottomTexts.modNote: This note will be only visible to staff members
bottomTexts.scrimStart: Leave to default if you want to look for a scrim now
bottomTexts.scrimStartFlexibility: If set, allow requests for any time between start and end
bottomTexts.scrimManagedByAnyone: If enabled, all users in this post can accept requests and delete the post, not just the owner.
bottomTexts.castTwitchAccounts: Twitch account where the tournament is casted. Player streams are added automatically based on their profile data.
bottomTexts.scrimRequestStartTime: Select a time within the post's time range
errors.dateInPast: Date can not be in the past
errors.dateTooFarInFuture: Date can not be more than 2 weeks in the future
errors.minUsersExcludingYourself: Must have at least {{min}} users excluding yourself
errors.staffCannotBeAuthor: The tournament author is already an organizer
errors.divBothOrNeither: Both min and max div must be set or neither
errors.tournamentMustBeSelected: Tournament must be selected when maps is tournament
errors.tournamentOnlyWhenMapsIsTournamen: Tournament should only be selected when maps is tournament
errors.visibilityMustBeDifferent: Not found visibility must be different from base visibility
errors.visibilityNotAllowedWhenPublic: Not found visibility can not be set if base visibility is public
errors.dateAfterScrimDate: Date can not be after the scrim date
errors.canNotSetIfLookingNow: Can not be set if looking for scrim now
errors.maxAssociationsReached: You have reached the maximum number of associations
bottomTexts.orgMembersInfo: Add yourself as admin to remain in control of this organization
bottomTexts.staffRolesInfo: Organizer has the same permissions as you except they can't add/remove staff. Streamer can only talk in chats and see room password/pool.
errors.dateMustNotBeFuture: Date must not be in the future
errors.dateTooOld: Date must be after Splatoon 1 release (May 28, 2015)
bottomTexts.modesExact: Only show events that match all selected modes
bottomTexts.authorIdsExcluded: You can find a user's id on their profile page
bottomTexts.banUserNoteHelp: This note is only visible to organization admins.
bottomTexts.banUserExpiresAtHelp: Leave empty for a permanent ban
bottomTexts.scrimCancelReasonHelp: Explain why you are cancelling the scrim. This will be visible to the other team.
errors.plusAlreadySuggested: This user has already been suggested
errors.plusAlreadyMember: This user is already a member of this tier
errors.plusCannotSuggest: Can't make a suggestion right now
bottomTexts.profileCustomName: If empty, your Discord display name is shown
bottomTexts.profileCustomUrl: For patrons (Supporter & above) short link is available. E.g. instead of sendou.ink/u/sendou, snd.ink/sendou can be used.
bottomTexts.profileBattlefy: Used for seeding and verification in some tournaments
bottomTexts.profileShowDiscordUniqueName: Show your Discord username publicly on your profile
bottomTexts.profileCommissionsOpen: Commissions automatically close after one month
bottomTexts.profileCommissionText: Price, slots open or other commission info
bottomTexts.profileNewProfileEnabled: Enable the new widget-based profile page (supporter only)
errors.profileCustomUrlStrangeChar: Custom URL can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
errors.profileCustomUrlNumbers: Custom URL can't only contain numbers
errors.profileCustomUrlDuplicate: Someone is already using this custom URL
errors.profileSensBothOrNeither: Motion sens can't be set if R-stick sens isn't
errors.profileInGameName: Must match format: Name#disc (1-10 characters, #, 4-5 alphanumeric)
bottomTexts.profilePronouns: This setting is optional! Your pronouns will be displayed on your profile, tournament rosters, SendouQ groups, and text channels.
errors.cannotFriendSelf: You can't send a friend request to yourself
errors.alreadyFriends: You are already friends with this user
errors.friendRequestExists: A friend request already exists between you and this user
bottomTexts.stayAsSub: If you don't find team members before registration ends, you will stay as a solo sub for the duration of the tournament
labels.regPrefersNotToHost: My team prefers not to host rooms
errors.regOwnerMustBeMember: The captain must be one of the players
errors.regTeamNameTaken: This team name is already taken
errors.regTooManyMembers: Too many players on the roster
errors.regMemberNoFriendCode: This player has no friend code set
errors.regMemberNoInGameName: This player has no in-game name set
errors.regMemberBanned: This player is currently banned from sendou.ink
errors.regMemberOnAnotherTeam: This player is already on another team
errors.regCannotRemoveParticipatedPlayer: Can't remove a player that has participated in the tournament
errors.regCheckedInBelowMinRoster: Checked in team can't go below the minimum roster size
